arabic: حمٓ
translation: Ha, Meem.

arabic: وَٱلْكِتَٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
translation: By the clear Book,

arabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍۢ مُّبَٰرَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
translation: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].

arabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
translation: On that night is made distinct every precise matter -

arabic: أَمْرًۭا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
translation: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

arabic: رَحْمَةًۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
translation: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

arabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.

arabic: لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
translation: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.

arabic: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّۢ يَلْعَبُونَ
translation: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.

arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
translation: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke.

arabic: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ ۖ هَٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
translation: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.

arabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
translation: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."

arabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
translation: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.

arabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌۭ مَّجْنُونٌ
translation: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."

arabic: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
translation: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].

arabic: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
translation: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.

arabic: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ كَرِيمٌ
translation: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger,

arabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌۭ
translation: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allah. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"

arabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
translation: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allah. Indeed, I have come to you with clear authority.

arabic: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
translation: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.

arabic: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
translation: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone."

arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌۭ مُّجْرِمُونَ
translation: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.

arabic: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
translation: [Allah said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.

arabic: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌۭ مُّغْرَقُونَ
translation: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."

arabic: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍۢ
translation: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

arabic: وَزُرُوعٍۢ وَمَقَامٍۢ كَرِيمٍۢ
translation: And crops and noble sites

arabic: وَنَعْمَةٍۢ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فَٰكِهِينَ
translation: And comfort wherein they were amused.

arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
translation: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.

arabic: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
translation: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.

arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
translation: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -

arabic: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
translation: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.

arabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنَٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
translation: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.

arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَٰٓؤٌۭا۟ مُّبِينٌ
translation: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.

arabic: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
translation: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying,

arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
translation: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.

arabic: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
translation: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."

arabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍۢ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَٰهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
translation: Are they better or the people of Tubba' and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَٰعِبِينَ
translation: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.

arabic: مَا خَلَقْنَٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
translation: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.

arabic: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقَٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
translation: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -

arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًۭى شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
translation: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

arabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
translation: Except those [believers] on whom Allah has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

arabic: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
translation: Indeed, the tree of zaqqum

arabic: طَعَامُ ٱلْأَثِيمِ
translation: Is food for the sinful.

arabic: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
translation: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies

arabic: كَغَلْىِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
translation: Like the boiling of scalding water.

arabic: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
translation: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,

arabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
translation: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."

arabic: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
translation: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!

arabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
translation: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."

arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍۢ
translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place;

arabic: فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍۢ
translation: Within gardens and springs,

arabic: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍۢ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍۢ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
translation: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.

arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍۢ
translation: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

arabic: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
translation: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.

arabic: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
translation: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire

arabic: فَضْلًۭا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
translation: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.

arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
translation: And indeed, We have eased the Qur'an in your tongue that they might be reminded.

arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
translation: So watch, [O Muhammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].
